title: Podcast Interview on How She Creates
excerpt: Several months ago I had the pleasure of recording an episode of the How She Creates podcast with the lovely Caylee and Lauren. I thought I had shared about this already on the blog, but as I get ready for…
body:
Several months ago I had the pleasure of recording an episode of the How She Creates podcast with the lovely Caylee and Lauren. I thought I had shared about this already on the blog, but as I get ready for another series of trips, I realized I in fact had not hit publish on this yet. We discussed one of my favorite topics: travel! I shared some of my best tips for creating while adventuring, packing just the essentials, and really savoring the experience through the process of making. It was a super fun conversation! 

You can listen to the interview AND download a free scripted quote printable here! Enjoy!
